raw_input: started cooing back when I talk to him
---

He's cooing back now when I talk to him. I say something, he looks right at me
and responds with this soft "ohhh" sound. We had a whole conversation for about
five minutes this morning. I'm obsessed.

Pediatrician says he's tracking faces really well and his weight is right on curve.
